summary: Mi Perfil Button Fix - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested 'Mi Perfil' dropdown navigation for all 5 roles (School, Teacher, Parent, Admin, Student). The fix successfully navigates to /perfil from avatar dropdown in header. Profile page correctly displays role-aware content: non-student roles show role badge + role info card, student shows 'Nivel X' badge + XP/streak/lessons stats. Logout button works for all roles. Sidebar navigation regression passed.

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only app, all data is MOCKED)

fix_verification.issue: Mi Perfil button in header dropdown did nothing when clicked
fix_applied: Header.jsx: Added onClick={() => navigate('/perfil')} to Mi Perfil DropdownMenuItem
App.js: /perfil route as standalone (outside Layout wrappers) with all roles allowed
ProfilePage.jsx: Role-aware with isStudent conditional for stats vs role info

test_credentials: No credentials needed - demo app with role selection via data-testid selectors

mocked_api.details: Frontend-only prototype, all data is hardcoded

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mi Perfil fix verified for all roles. The /perfil route is standalone (outside both MobileLayout and Layout wrappers), so it renders without sidebar/bottom nav. Profile page is role-aware: student sees XP/streak/lessons stats + Nivel badge, non-students see role label badge + role info card. Avatar dropdown is triggered by clicking round button in header (selector: button.rounded-full).
